name: magpie-industries-sc
description: A Star Citizen community web application for orgs, friend groups, and solo players.

scripts.dev: npm run dev:client & npm run dev:server
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=client && npm run build --workspace=server
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=client && npm run lint --workspace=server
scripts.sync:gamedata: npm run sync:extract && npm run sync:generate
scripts.seed: npx esbuild server/prisma/seed-game-data.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=server/prisma/seed-game-data.mjs --external:@prisma/client && cd server && node prisma/seed-game-data.mjs
scripts.data:view: npx ts-node --project scripts/tsconfig.json scripts/data-viewer.ts && start data/viewer.html
